'''Mak Sezala''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] following [[Borsk Fey'lya]]'s election to [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]]. He initially opposed Fey'lya's plan to lure the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to uninhabited worlds via claims of hiding [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but eventually supported it, 'contributing' several worlds from Bothan Space to the plan.

{{Char-stub}}
